# CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-915-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type Profile struct {
	ID      int    `json:"id"`
	Name    string `json:"name"`
	Role    string `json:"role"`
	Balance int    `json:"balance"`
}

var profiles = map[int]Profile{}

// Safe: only explicitly allowed attributes may be updated from client input.
func UpdateProfile(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	idStr := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	pid, _ := strconv.Atoi(idStr)
	var body struct {
		Name string `json:"name"`
	}
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	p := profiles[pid]
	p.Name = body.Name
	profiles[pid] = p
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
